purpose: Predeclare v0.14 Grid-Delta Atlas scoring limits before final TOST/Switzerland/Grid-Delta results are generated.

parser_contract.note: Both tools read the top-level fields map. Extra metadata keys are intentional reviewer context and are ignored by the current parsers.

score_policy.hard_release_gate: All fields with gate=hard_release_gate or gate=static_exactness must be finite and within the declared metric limits when present and compatible in paired CPU/GPU wrfout.
score_policy.report_only: Fields with no recognized metric key are inventoried and plotted but do not affect the tool pass/fail verdict until a later frozen threshold is approved.
score_policy.nonfinite_policy: Any nonfinite GPU field in paired output remains a hard inventory failure under the atlas gate.
score_policy.mandatory_presence_note: The atlas builder has its own default mandatory core list. This manifest records the intended final-run list but current parsers do not add manifest-only mandatory fields automatically.

canary_tost.atlas_threshold_source: scripts/equivalence_demo.py and docs/equivalence-demo.md predeclared operational RMSE tolerances.

switzerland_gotthard_128.note: No Switzerland-specific override is proposed; the documented Switzerland plan uses the same ten hard RMSE limits.

static_exactness_groups.formula_tight_source: proofs/v014/live_nest_base_source_fix.md target-patch residuals: HGT 2.4167598553503922e-05 m, PB 0.04890023032203317 Pa, MUB 0.044447155625675805 Pa, PHB 0.09328280997578986 m2 s-2, all under 0.2 max_abs.

report_only_field_families.reason: The atlas gate requires reviewer attention for systematic drift, but no frozen physical RMSE envelope exists in the reviewed references.
RAINNC has a predeclared 1.0 mm RMSE limit; cumulus and snow accumulators do not yet have independent v0.14 thresholds.
These fields are useful attribution evidence but thresholds would be speculative without a dedicated oracle or review.
No predeclared v0.14 all-cell tolerance exists. Inventory and plots are required before any future threshold freeze.

T2.rationale: Predeclared operational equivalence limit for 2 m temperature; sub-station-error scale in scripts/equivalence_demo.py.
T2.risk: Can pass pooled RMSE while hiding terrain or land/ocean localized error, so atlas split plots and station TOST must still be reviewed.

U10.rationale: Predeclared operational equivalence limit for 10 m zonal wind.
U10.risk: KI-9 showed U10 wind divergence can grow with lead time; a pooled pass still needs lead-slope review.

V10.rationale: Predeclared operational equivalence limit for 10 m meridional wind.
V10.risk: KI-9 showed V/V10 are the dominant drift channel; require drift and worst-map review even if pooled RMSE passes.

PSFC.rationale: Predeclared operational surface-pressure limit, about 0.1 percent of 100 kPa.
PSFC.risk: Residual PSFC error can be dynamical rather than a writer offset; fail should not be waived as diagnostic without proof.

RAINNC.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for accumulated grid-scale precipitation.
RAINNC.risk: Sparse precipitation can pass pooled RMSE while localized maxima differ; inspect p99/max and spatial maps.

T.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for 3D perturbation potential temperature, theta minus 300 K.
T.risk: Temperature drift may be coupled to dynamics or physics; pooled pass is not a bitwise or operator-parity claim.

U.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for 3D zonal wind.
U.risk: Stagger-aware shape equality is mandatory; do not crop or unstagger silently.

V.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for 3D meridional wind.
V.risk: KI-9 showed V drift much faster than U in old failed runs; a breach should remain a hard failure.

W.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for small-magnitude, noisy 3D vertical velocity.
W.risk: Small RMSE can coexist with localized acoustic artifacts; inspect p99/max and vertical worst index.

QVAPOR.rationale: Predeclared operational limit for 3D water-vapor mixing ratio.
QVAPOR.risk: Moisture can compensate in station metrics; require grid atlas inventory and hydrometeor report-only review.

XLAT.rationale: Static coordinate fields should be copied from the same grid definition, not tuned against forecast output.
XLAT.risk: A hard exact failure may expose a writer convention mismatch rather than dynamics, but it is still a release-blocking atlas inventory issue.

XLONG.rationale: Static coordinate fields should be copied from the same grid definition.
XLONG.risk: A hard exact failure may expose a writer convention mismatch rather than dynamics.

XLAT_U.rationale: U-staggered latitude is grid metadata and should be exact.
XLAT_U.risk: Requires correct staggered coordinate writer payload.

XLONG_U.rationale: U-staggered longitude is grid metadata and should be exact.
XLONG_U.risk: Requires correct staggered coordinate writer payload.

XLAT_V.rationale: V-staggered latitude is grid metadata and should be exact.
XLAT_V.risk: Requires correct staggered coordinate writer payload.

XLONG_V.rationale: V-staggered longitude is grid metadata and should be exact.
XLONG_V.risk: Requires correct staggered coordinate writer payload.

LANDMASK.rationale: Static categorical land mask must not drift.
LANDMASK.risk: Categorical mismatch invalidates terrain and land/ocean split interpretation.

LU_INDEX.rationale: Static land-use category must not drift.

MAPFAC_M.rationale: Map factors are static grid metrics; prior static-metric proof treated mismatches as writer bugs, not forecast tolerance.
MAPFAC_M.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_U.rationale: U-staggered map factor is static grid metadata.
MAPFAC_U.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_V.rationale: V-staggered map factor is static grid metadata.
MAPFAC_V.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_MX.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_MY.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_UX.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_UY.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_VX.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

MAPFAC_VY.risk: Exactness may fail stale artifacts that predate metric-writer fixes.

SINALPHA.risk: Failure can rotate wind components incorrectly.

COSALPHA.risk: Failure can rotate wind components incorrectly.

ZS.risk: Failure indicates static land-state or writer mismatch.

DZS.risk: Failure indicates static land-state or writer mismatch.

CLAT.risk: Failure indicates grid or projection metadata mismatch.

HGT.rationale: Live-nest base source proof closed target-patch HGT to 2.4167598553503922e-05 m under a documented 0.2 max_abs validation limit.
HGT.risk: CPU-WRF wrfout terrain convention can differ from raw wrfinput; breach is a release blocker unless a reviewed WRF convention exception is recorded.

PB.rationale: Live-nest base source proof closed target-patch PB to 0.04890023032203317 Pa under a documented 0.2 max_abs validation limit.
PB.risk: This is a tight base-state formula limit, not an operational RMSE tolerance; breach should trigger base-state review.

PHB.rationale: Live-nest base source proof closed target-patch PHB to 0.09328280997578986 m2 s-2 under a documented 0.2 max_abs validation limit.
PHB.risk: This is a tight base-state formula limit; breach should not be waived as forecast chaos.

MUB.rationale: Live-nest base source proof closed target-patch MUB to 0.044447155625675805 Pa under a documented 0.2 max_abs validation limit.
MUB.risk: This is a tight base-state formula limit; breach should trigger native-init/live-nest review.

P.report_only_reason: Mandatory core inventory field, but no frozen v0.14 all-cell RMSE/max_abs envelope was found in the reviewed references.

PH.report_only_reason: Mandatory core inventory field, but no frozen v0.14 all-cell RMSE/max_abs envelope was found in the reviewed references.

MU.report_only_reason: Mandatory core inventory field, but no frozen v0.14 all-cell RMSE/max_abs envelope was found in the reviewed references.

RAINC.report_only_reason: Mandatory precipitation inventory field. RAINNC has a documented 1.0 mm limit; RAINC/cumulus precipitation does not yet have an independently frozen limit.

old_failed_run_check.note: The candidate intentionally preserves the old NOT_EQUIVALENT result; it does not widen tolerances to pass historical red runs.
